differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) with disseminated manifestations
next_steps: Serologic testing for Bartonella henselae (IgM and IgG/IFA)
Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry to rule out Chronic Granulomatous Disease
Liver biopsy with histopathology and tissue cultures (bacterial, mycobacterial, and fungal)
PET-CT scan to determine optimal biopsy site and assess full metabolic burden
